home.title: AI-Powered Smart Agriculture Advisor
home.subtitle: Make data-driven farming decisions with advanced AI predictions for crop recommendations, yield forecasting, and fertilizer optimization.

crop.title: Crop Recommendation
crop.desc: Get AI-powered suggestions for the best crops based on your soil and climate data

yield.title: Yield Prediction
yield.desc: Accurate forecasts of expected yields to help you plan better and maximize profits

fertilizer.title: Fertilizer Advisory
fertilizer.desc: Optimized fertilizer recommendations to improve soil health and crop productivity

step1.title: Enter Data
step1.desc: Input soil parameters, weather conditions, and farm details

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.desc: Our ML models process your data for accurate predictions

step3.title: Get Results
step3.desc: Receive crop, yield, and fertilizer recommendations

step4.title: Make Decisions
step4.desc: Implement insights to optimize your farm productivity

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Farming?
cta.subtitle: Join farmers using AI to make smarter decisions and increase their yields

home.footer: © 2025 Smart Agriculture Advisor. Powered by AI for Farmers.

weather.title: Weather Updates
weather.subtitle: Real-time weather information for your farm location

map.title: Agricultural Map & Weather
map.subtitle: Interactive map with real-time weather layers for rainfall, temperature, wind, and storm predictions
map.rainfallDesc: Toggle rainfall layer to see precipitation patterns
map.cloudDesc: View cloud coverage and formation patterns
map.mapDesc: Use the layer control (top right) to toggle different weather overlays. Click on markers to view regional information.

usage.title: Map Usage Guide
usage.zoom: Use the +/- buttons or scroll to zoom in/out
usage.pan: Click and drag to pan across the map
usage.layers: Use the layer control in the top-right to toggle weather overlays
usage.markers: Click on markers to see regional agricultural information
usage.combine: Combine multiple layers to analyze weather patterns comprehensively

chat.title: AI Chat Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask me anything about crops, weather, farming techniques, or soil health
chat.placeholder: Ask about crops, weather, or farming tips...
chat.context: I have access to your soil data and prediction history
